name: Qualified Campus Lodging Exclusion

eligibility.description: Available to employees of institutions described in 170(b)(1)(A)(ii) for lodging located on or near campus; exclusion is limited if rent paid is below 5% of appraised value.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Employees of educational institutions or academic health centers can exclude the value of qualified campus lodging from gross income, subject to certain rent requirements.
